name: Cheesy Chicken Breast
recipeIngredient: Bread crumbs or Kellogg's Cornflake crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts between two sheets of wax paper until they are thin.
2. Place a tablespoon of cream cheese in the center of each chicken breast and roll them up, securing with a toothpick.
3. Roll the chicken breasts first in melted butter, then in bread crumbs.
4. Place the rolls in a microwave-safe dish.
5. Cook on high for 6 to 9 minutes.
